title: dendrorkis coriscensis
side_effects: Dendrorkis coriscensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with medications. Some examples of side effects include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain in individuals who consume the plant in excess. Additionally, improper use of dendrorkis coriscensis can also lead to respiratory problems, such as difficulty breathing and asthma-like symptoms, in individuals with pre-existing conditions. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can cause liver damage and kidney failure.
